_comment: Expressive-asset catalog (#593, parent #586). The open registry of asset SETS an author can browse & shop in the full-page picker context (demo:expressive-asset-shop) — the catalog the icon intent's `name` and the expressive-symbol intent resolve a glyph within. It is an OPEN config registry: WE ships this reference vocabulary, a project EXTENDS it (Config-Extends-Platform-Default); it mandates no single set. `kind` ∈ icon-set | emoji-set | sticker-pack. Rendered by Web Docs (#398); not gate-validated.

label: Material Symbols
summary: Google's variable icon font — the icon intent's size/weight/style dimensions map directly onto its font-variation axes. A name (e.g. `home`, `search`) resolves to one glyph within this set.

label: Lucide
summary: An MIT-spirited community fork of Feather — consistent 24px stroke icons, SVG-per-glyph, tree-shakeable. A common most-permissive default icon set for an open project.

label: Heroicons
summary: A small, opinionated set shipped in outline / solid / mini styles — illustrates that an icon set may carry its own style variants the icon intent's `style` dimension selects.

label: Unicode Emoji
summary: The standard emoji set — its skin-tone and emoji/text presentation variants are exactly the expressive-symbol intent's skinTone + presentation dimensions. The :-trigger picker (demo:inline-emoji-picker) shops this set; rendering is the platform emoji font (renderStrategy).

label: Reference Sticker Pack
summary: A reference custom-image sticker pack illustrating the expressive-symbol `mode: sticker` path (a sticker is a custom image, not a Unicode glyph) — the proof a project extends the catalog with its own non-Unicode asset set.
